name: Fire Soldier Ant
description: A very aggressive tier 3 fire soldier that protects workers and patrols upper yard routes in force. Alone it is manageable, but alongside workers it becomes a serious threat.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 84
3-Combo Bite: 60
Charged Bite: 108
Stunning Bite: 48

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It snaps sideways with a quick bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or move off its dominant side.
attacks.notes: It shares the core pattern of the red soldier ant.

attacks.name: 3-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It strings together three quick bites with little breathing room.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not punish the first opening; wait until the whole string ends.
attacks.notes: The string punishes anyone trying to trade with slow weapons.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It draws back for a moment before lunging farther.
attacks.howToAvoid: Sidestep it rather than backing straight away.
attacks.notes: This is its highest-range, highest-damage basic hit.

attacks.name: Stunning Bite
attacks.tell: It delivers a shorter but heavier bite meant to disrupt your rhythm.
attacks.howToAvoid: Perfect block it or create space before your stamina collapses.
attacks.notes: It does not hit as hard as the charged bite, but it pressures player posture heavily.

behavior: It acts as the colony's bodyguard. It patrols with workers, answers fights immediately, and uses the same bite suite as a red soldier ant, only with far more damage.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and chases for a while, though it can suddenly lose interest. The real danger comes when nearby workers join in and fill the area with bites and acid at once.
interactionWithCreatures: It protects workers and can still finish off weaker creatures like aphids. Within the colony it remains passive until something provokes one of its members.
strategy: Fresh remains the best answer. You can parry its bites if you already know the red soldier pattern, but never fight soldiers and workers together without first clearing space or breaking aggro lines.
